name: lfk
desc: ⚡ LFK is a lightning-fast, keyboard-focused, yazi-inspired terminal user interface for navigating and managing Kubernetes clusters. Built for speed and efficie…
descFull: ⚡ LFK is a lightning-fast, keyboard-focused, yazi-inspired terminal user interface for navigating and managing Kubernetes clusters. Built for speed and efficiency, it brings a three-column Miller columns layout with an owner-based resource hierarchy to your terminal.
